description: Pinned ground-truth outputs for each fixture in audit/fixtures/. The audit script re-runs the kernel against each input and asserts (a) status matches, (b) every required reason substring is present, (c) fingerprint matches exactly. Fingerprints are deterministic given identical inputs and a versioned execution (kernel VERIFY_VERSION = v15.5-austere-1).

reasonSubstrings: field 'emailAddress' projects to TS name 'emailAddress' but SQL name 'email'
multiple fields collapsing into SQL name 'email'
field 'username' projects to TS name 'username' but SQL name 'name'
multiple fields collapsing into SQL name 'name'
field 'runningTotal' is present in TS projection but excluded from SQL
field 'lastSeenAt' is present in SQL projection but excluded from TS
field 'descriptionFr' projects to TS name 'description' but SQL name 'descriptionFr'
multiple fields collapsing into TS name 'description'
field 'currentPeriodEnd' projects to TS name 'currentPeriodEnd' but SQL name 'current_period_end'
